title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
